Host Tindo
And Fire Girls

About

Meet Host Tindo

Host Tindo is a Afro-Fusion artist from Mwenezi, Zimbabwe. Performing together with her group Fire Girls, she has released a string of albums and singles — including Regerai Ndidye Rifa Rangu, Zviuya Zuri Mberi, Raramo Haina Dhize and Ndine Mubvunzo Kwamuri — recorded, mixed and mastered at Stream Studios, in Zimbabwe.

Singing in Shona, Ndebele, Zulu and English Host Tindo's music speaks directly to everyday life — love, loss, faith and resilience — delivered with the driving guitar lines and rich harmonies that define Sungura. Every performance is a conversation between artist and audience — raw, real, and impossible to forget.
